description: One guild white-paper rendered as its own standalone Android + iOS app. Generator at phone/whitepapers/_generator/build.py walks these instances, renders the _template/ directory against each one's parameters, and writes phone/whitepapers/<slug>/{android,ios}/. Both halves share no code with the main acg-android / acg-ios apps — they're intentionally small one-subject apps that could ship to Play Store / TestFlight independently.

slug.description: kebab-case · determines output dir + applicationId suffix

paper_url.description: deep link into the site's paper reader

android_package.description: Kotlin package / Android namespace (shared across all paper apps)

android_app_id.description: applicationId — must be unique per paper so they co-install on one device

ios_bundle_id.description: iOS bundle id — must be unique per paper; create an ASC record for each before TestFlight upload

theme_color_hex.description: primary tint · drives status bar + accent

label.description: launcher label — defaults to slug if not given

body_url.description: in-app reader URL — defaults to the paper's page on the fork's Pages site. Rendered in a WebView on the Reader tab.

mini_app.description: optional id of a module under phone/whitepapers/_minis/<id>/ · when set, its Kotlin files get overlaid onto the generated app and a third nav tab appears. The paper IS the documentation; the mini_app is the running interpretation.
